items.name: Critter on the Shoulder
items.description:
Claim this exclusive shoulder pet, the cute "Critter" from the movie Lydia and the Mist Rider.

Starting March 3rd, you can earn this limited-edition treasure by venturing into Fracterra to celebrate the launch of the movie in theaters. 

Master the art of Astromagic, join Lydia’s crew, and defeat the Spellbinder in the ultimate final battle to unlock your reward. 

Visit Fracterra : https://www.roblox.com/games/18752369972/Fracterra-RP to begin your quest!
